title: RadminVN
description: simple mod for RadminVPN servers... or isnt?
body:
# <center>RadminVN</center>




### EN:
A simple fabric mod for [RadminVPN](https://www.radmin-vpn.com/) user who want to host a minecraft server.

Features:
- CustomLAN integration: the classic 1.16.2 [CustomLAN](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-lan) UI & Logics inside this mod (thanks DimiDimit)
- Anti-FastBreak: notify everyone of the suspected player using FastBreak hack.
- Anti-LogAcc: useful for offline server that often have dupicated username/IPs.
- Anti-Reach: yep... prevent reaching far from original survival reach (3.5 blocks).
- Some useful commands that you can try finding it yourself :)))


### VI:
1 chiếc mod nhỏ gọn (bundle thêm dependencies vào nhỏ dữ chưa :l) cho ai mở map/server trên [RadminVPN](https://www.radmin-vpn.com/).

1 số tính năng:
- CustomLAN tích hợp: UI & Logic của [CustomLAN](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-lan) 1.16.2 được ép sẳn trong mod (cảm ơn DimiDimit)
- Anti-FastBreak: báo cho tất cả về player sử dụng hack FastBreak.
- Anti-LogAcc: báo logacc cho OP/Host khi trùng name/IPs
- Anti-Reach: kick khi reach xa hơn bình thường ở mode survival (3.5 blocks)
- còn có 1 số lệnh mà bạn nên tự mò trong game :)))
  
### **Credits/Ghi công**
- Dream_Da_Vang (ông hoàng java trong igoo, chủ sáng tác mod :D)
- Fkrystal (thenoppy12)

<details>
<summary>Lưu ý/Note</summary>


### VN:
Bạn cũng có thể check mod bằng các loại antivirus khác nhau, đây là khi check bằng VirusTotal: [VirusTotal](https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file-analysis/MTkwZmE5MzZmMTk5YzRkMmVkMGFmMjdmYzVlZWQxNzM6MTc1NzgxNjE0NQ==)

### EN:
You can also check mods with different antivirus, this is when checking mods with VirusTotal:
[VirusTotal](https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file-analysis/MTkwZmE5MzZmMTk5YzRkMmVkMGFmMjdmYzVlZWQxNzM6MTc1NzgxNjE0NQ==)

</details>
